prestazioni: Engine: M272 DE 35 (3.5L V6, 24V, 296HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Paired with a custom Schrick 272° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) for high-lift, aggressive overlap, and a ported/polished cylinder head by KSP Racing with oversized Ferrea valves and titanium retainers.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (ball-bearing, 82mm compressor) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by TurboSmart, mated to a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller. Intercooled via a custom air-to-water setup with a PWR radiator and Bosch 044 fuel pump supporting a 1,000cc ID1000 injectors and a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability.

Suspension & Handling: KW Variant 3 coilovers (SLK-specific valving) with adjustable rebound and compression damping, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars. Polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (Black Series) for subframe, control arms, and differential mounts. StopTech ST-60 big brake kit (380mm front rotors, 6-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (R172-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders, paired with a custom 3D-printed ducktail spoiler (SLK350-specific mold). Underbody aero includes a custom carbon fiber flat floor panel and vortex generators by APR Performance.

Wheels: BBS LM-R (9x19 ET25 front, 10.5x19 ET30 rear) with custom offsets for flush fitment, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear). Forged aluminum center locks by DPE and titanium wheel bolts from ARP.

Exterior & Interior: Full Respray in Mercedes-Benz Designo Magno Alanite Grey (matte) with custom PPF by XPEL Stealth. Interior features Recaro Pole Position seats (SLK-specific mounts) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in), and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub. Engine bay showcases a custom carbon fiber intake manifold cover, titanium bolt kit from TiSpeed, and a custom billet aluminum oil cap by 034Motorsport.
